front.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, front view, full body standing idle pose. The character is a Memory Weaver — the 1st advancement of the Mnemonist class in a dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. Description: evolved Mnemonist with more complex robe patterns, memory threads (translucent luminous lines) extending from shoulders, dual-orb staff (top and bottom orbs), two floating tomes instead of one, memory threads emanating from fingertips, glowing eyes. Art style: 512x512 pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing, 2.5 head-to-body chibi proportions. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
